name: io.github.kofujimura/tctc-mcp
description: ERC-7303 on-chain roles for AI agents: check permissions via balanceOf, grant/revoke by minting/burning control tokens — no permission server

packageArguments.name: --config
packageArguments.description: Path to the role/chain config JSON (see examples/ in the repo; the secret-free Sepolia demo config works out of the box)

environmentVariables.name: TCTC_ADMIN_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Issuer key enabling grant_role/revoke_role (admin mode). Omit for read-only mode: state-changing tools are then not even registered
